steps.title: Use Desmos to fit the two-point table
steps.content: Enter the two rows as $x_1=[4,6]$ and $y_1=[17,23]$. Then type the linear regression row $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos gives $m=3$ and $b=5$, so the function is $h(x)=3x+5$.

steps.title: Check the answer choices
steps.content: Choice B is $h(x)=3x+5$, which matches the regression model. It also checks in the table: $h(4)=3(4)+5=17$ and $h(6)=3(6)+5=23$.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: $h(x)=\frac{1}{3}x-\frac{5}{3}$ gives $h(4)=-\frac{1}{3}$, not 17. Eliminated.
  • Choice B: $h(x)=3x+5$ gives $h(4)=17$ and $h(6)=23$. Correct.
  • Choice C: $h(x)=4x+17$ has slope 4, but the table's line has slope 3. Eliminated.
  • Choice D: $h(x)=6x+23$ has slope 6, not 3. Eliminated.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
